name: Aloha Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers crumbs and melted margarine. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, and milk. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, ensuring each is incorporated before adding the next.
5. Stir in the toasted macadamia nuts.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and let it cool completely before removing the rim.
9. Chill thoroughly before serving.
10. Before serving, top with sliced kiwi.
